hook.summary: A hand triggers a massive chain reaction on a match-3 board, clearing candies and filling a progress bar.
hook.visual_action: Hand taps a special candy, causing a large explosion and clearing many pieces.
hook.text_overlay: Candy story, NO ADS AND FREE, DOWNLOAD

scene_flow: Initial match-3 board setup with a central gift box and colorful candies.
A hand taps a special candy, triggering a large-scale clearing of the board.
The board refills and subsequent matches continue the satisfying chain reactions.
The progress bar at the top fills as the player clears more candies.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy satisfying match-3 puzzle games with cute, colorful themes.
